g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the short-circuit GAP logic when no candidates exist')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the prompt building step in Phase 4')
sendPrompt('Explain the chain-of-thought decomposition in classification')
sendPrompt('How is the final classification aggregated?')
